# setItem(_:forPeripheral:)

**Instance Method**

Sets all of the information about the specified peripheral at once.

## Declaration

```swift
func setItem(_ item: PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.Item, forPeripheral peripheral: CBPeripheral)
```

## Parameters

- **item**: A [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/playgroundbluetooth/playgroundbluetoothconnectionview/item] that holds information about the specified peripheral.
- **peripheral**: The peripheral corresponding to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/playgroundbluetooth/playgroundbluetoothconnectionview/item] being displayed.

## Displaying Peripherals

- **PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.Item**: A value that holds information about a peripheral displayed in a connection view.
